EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAffineTransformation2D3GEN

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define and manipulate affine transformations. IAffineTransformation2D3GEN is generic version of IAffineTransformation2D3

[Guid("20F586DE-9B4B-47A2-A9A7-ABC70FFD6E56")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAffineTransformation2D3GEN

Properties

IsReflective

Indicates if the transformation contains a reflection (determinant is negative).

bool IsReflective { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MoveOrigin

The origin of accumulated transformations used when projecting an affine transformation to a different spatial reference system.

IPoint MoveOrigin { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotation

The rotation angle. Will not be able if different x/y scale factors have been incorporated into the transformation.

double Rotation { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference in which this transformation is meaningful.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

XScale

The scale along the X axis.

double XScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

XTranslation

The translation along the X axis.

double XTranslation { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

YScale

The scale along the Y axis.

double YScale { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

YTranslation

The translation along the Y axis.

double YTranslation { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

DefineConformalFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best conformal affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

void DefineConformalFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[], ref IPoint[])

Defines the best affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

void DefineFromControlPoints(ref IPoint[] fromPoints, ref IPoint[] toPoints)

Parameters

fromPoints IPoint[]
toPoints IPoint[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromEnvelopes(IEnvelope, IEnvelope) 

void DefineFromEnvelopes(IEnvelope from, IEnvelope to)

Parameters

from IEnvelope
to IEnvelope

DefineFromEnvelopesEx(IEnvelope, IEnvelope, IEnvelope, bool, bool, bool) 

void DefineFromEnvelopesEx(IEnvelope from, IEnvelope to, IEnvelope outFrom, bool assumeFalseOrigin, bool keepAspect, bool flipIt)

Parameters

from IEnvelope
to IEnvelope
outFrom IEnvelope
assumeFalseOrigin bool
keepAspect bool
flipIt bool

DefineReflection(ILine) 

void DefineReflection(ILine l)

Parameters

l ILine

GetControlPointError(int, ref double, ref double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetControlPointError(int i, ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(ref double, ref double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetRMSError(ref double fromError, ref double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Move(double, double)

Incorporates a translation factor into the transformation.

void Move(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MoveVector(ILine) 

void MoveVector(ILine movementVector)

Parameters

movementVector ILine

void PostMultiply(IAffineTransformation2D3GEN postTransform)

postTransform IAffineTransformation2D3GEN

void PreMultiply(IAffineTransformation2D3GEN preTransform)

preTransform IAffineTransformation2D3GEN

Project(ISpatialReference) 

void Project(ISpatialReference newSpatialReference)

Parameters

newSpatialReference ISpatialReference

QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection, ref double[])

Returns the linear coefficients which define the two dimensional affine transformation. The array size of the incoming parameters needs to be 6.

void QueryLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

Reset()

Resets the tranformation.

void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotate(double)

Incorporates a rotation (in radians) into the transformation.

void Rotate(double da)

Parameters

da double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Scale(double, double)

Incorporates scale factors into the transformation.

void Scale(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection, ref double[])

Sets the linear coefficients which define the two dimensional affine transformation. The array size of the incoming parameters needs to be 6.

void SetLinearCoefficients(esriTransformDirection Direction, ref double[] @params)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
params double[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

TransformMeasuresFF(esriTransformDirection, ref double[], ref double[])

Transforms floating point measures to floating point measures (or do the inverse).

inMeasures double[]
outMeasures double[]
